title: Akunimal/AI-Router-Blocker-AiO
summary: Open-source DevSecOps gateway for AI traffic. Intercept, audit, and route LLM requests to prevent data leaks and enforce zero-trust security policies.

title: PatriceA/octipus
summary: An open-source, self-hosted assistant that delegates real work to a swarm of specialist AI agents.

title: Aseiel/VideoHighlighter
summary: Open-source local AI video analyzer powered by Ollama. Visual search, automatic highlights, scene/action/object detection, audio analysis, and subtitle generation. Free, offline alternative to Twelve Labs, Runway, and Descript.

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: matteopasseri407/NeXgen-Engine
summary: Configure your AI coding CLIs from one Git repo you can diff and revert: author AGENTS.md, MCP config, and Markdown memory once, render them to each tool's native format, check for drift, and sync across machines fail-closed. Linux stable, Windows beta.

title: CorvinLabs/CorvinOS
summary: Self-hosted agentic OS — connects Claude Code, Codex or Hermes Agent to Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack & Email. EU AI Act 2026 & GDPR compliance by architecture.

title: sivabalaji1986/agentic-transaction-investigator
summary: A multi-agent fraud investigation system — A2A, MCP, runtime agent registry, RAG, Vision and human-in-the-loop analyst review.

title: 1Panel-dev/MaxKB
summary: 🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.  强大易用的开源企业级智能体平台。

title: opencrawling/opencrawling
summary: OpenCrawling: High-Performance Enterprise Data Ingestion, Federation & Security Framework for AI and Search.

title: thekaveh/atlas
summary: Atlas — self-hosted, source-configurable, multi-disciplinary engineering platform for gen-AI, ML, and data work. 30+ OSS Docker Compose services (Ollama, LiteLLM, Supabase, n8n, Airflow, Spark, Weaviate, Neo4j, JupyterHub, Ray, ComfyUI, …) pre-wired behind Kong. Interactive TUI wizard, configurable tracks, one-command launch.

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive memory for AI agents & teams — beyond RAG. Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter every time you search: hybrid search + a neural memory graph that learns. Works with Claude, ChatGPT & any MCP client.

title: ginkida/gokin
summary: A powerful CLI tool that brings AI assistance directly to your terminal. Gokin understands your codebase and helps with file operations, code search, shell commands, git workflows, task management, and more - all through natural language.

title: warifmust/agenta
summary: A thin, self-hosted runtime for building, running, and observing AI agents, defined with config, not code.

title: mnimtz/printix-tonerwatch
summary: Multi-tenant Printix BI toner monitor + ordering console for MSPs. Autonomous ordering with AI SKU suggestions (OpenAI/Azure/Gemini/Anthropic/Ollama) + daily cap. Alerts via Resend/SMTP/Graph. Entra SSO auto-setup, Azure SQL/SQLite, Azure Blob backup, M365 Copilot indexing. Kanban, saved views, activity feed. EFIGS i18n.

title: open-webui/open-webui
summary: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

title: wangzhe04/ruyi-workbench-oss
summary: 开源 Windows 本地 AI 工作台｜OpenAI-compatible + Claude CLI，99 个桌面/Office 工具，可回退文件操作与可视化多 Agent 工作流。

title: VivekDahariya/PriAI
summary: Build your own offline domain-specific AI from your knowledge.

title: tonkonozhenko-mi/ai_private_workspace
summary: Local-first desktop app (macOS & Windows) to chat with your own projects — offline RAG over your files, grounded answers with sources. No cloud, no accounts.

title: immapolar/Thicc
summary: 🍑 Lightning-fast Claude Code conversation compressor. Eliminates "Context low" warnings without losing context.
